description: Extend Makefile with up, down, network, migrate, cosign-keygen, and log targets

tasks.name: Add network target
tasks.description: Create fawkes-net idempotently (docker network create fawkes-net || true)
tasks.acceptance: make network succeeds on first run; make network succeeds on second run (already exists, no error)

tasks.name: Add up target
tasks.description: Call make network then docker compose up -d; print DefectDojo and Infisical URLs
tasks.acceptance: make up starts containers and prints http://localhost:8080, http://localhost:8082

tasks.name: Add down target
tasks.description: docker compose down to stop all services
tasks.acceptance: make down stops all ufawkessec containers cleanly

tasks.name: Add migrate target
tasks.description: Run docker compose exec defectdojo python manage.py migrate and createsuperuser --noinput; document required env vars
tasks.acceptance: make migrate runs both commands; help text documents DJANGO_SUPERUSER_USERNAME, DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD, DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL

tasks.name: Add cosign-keygen target
tasks.description: Generate cosign key pair, print instructions for storing private key, delete cosign.key from disk
tasks.acceptance: make cosign-keygen creates cosign.key and cosign.pub, prints Woodpecker secret instructions, removes cosign.key; cosign.key absent after completion

tasks.name: Add logs-defectdojo target
tasks.description: Tail logs for defectdojo and defectdojo-nginx containers
tasks.acceptance: make logs-defectdojo runs docker compose logs -f defectdojo defectdojo-nginx

tasks.name: Add logs-falco target
tasks.acceptance: make logs-falco runs docker compose logs -f falco

tasks.name: Update help output
tasks.description: Document all new targets in the make help section
tasks.acceptance: make help shows network, up, down, migrate, cosign-keygen, logs-defectdojo, logs-falco with descriptions
